type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: not reportable to ON MOE TRA due to exemption criteria for ethanol.Toxic substances 3. (1) The following substances are prescribed as toxic substances for the purposes of the Act: 1. Any substance that is a NPRI substance, if the substance is in the form specified in the NPRI Notice in which the substance is listed. 2. Acetone. O. Reg. 455/09, s. 3 (1); O. Reg. 125/10, s. 3 (1). (2) For greater certainty, a product that contains a NPRI substance that is intended for human or animal consumption and that is manufactured at a food manufacturing or beverage manufacturing facility identified by a NAICS code commencing with the digits “311” or “3121” is not a toxic substance. O. Reg. 455/09, s. 3 (2); O. Reg. 125/10, s. 3 (2).

not reportable to ON MOE TRA due to exemption criteria for ethanol.Toxic substances
3.  (1)  The following substances are prescribed as toxic substances for the purposes of the Act: 
1. Any substance that is a NPRI substance, if the substance is in the form specified in the NPRI Notice in which the substance is listed.
2. Acetone. O. Reg. 455/09, s. 3 (1); O. Reg. 125/10, s. 3 (1).
(2)  For greater certainty, a product that contains a NPRI substance that is intended for human or animal consumption and that is manufactured at a food manufacturing or beverage manufacturing facility identified by a NAICS code commencing with the digits “311” or “3121” is not a toxic substance. O. Reg. 455/09, s. 3 (2); O. Reg. 125/10, s. 3 (2).
